title: LeoTweaks Enderpearl Highlight
description:
Highlights Enderpearls upon being thrown to more easily spot them. Useful for PVP!
No Mods required, all in Vanilla Minecraft.
body:
### This Resourcepack Highlights Enderpearls upon being thrown to substitute having to enable hitboxes during PVP in order to see them.

---
With this pack, you won't just be able to tell where your own enderpearl is landing more clearly, but also your opponents enderpearls.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/K7t8Gg3IyCM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
